goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n) + (x - a) * polynomial_eval_bound(q, x, n)
polynomial_eval(p, x) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x - a) * polynomial_eval(q, x)
exists(k0: Polynomial[R]) { k0 = q and forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x0) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x0 - a) * polynomial_eval(k0, x0) } }

p.c: not exists(k0: Polynomial[R]) { k0 = q and forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x0) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x0 - a) * polynomial_eval(k0, x0) } }
(forall(x0: Polynomial[R]) { not (x0 = q and forall(x1: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x1) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x1 - a) * polynomial_eval(x0, x1) }) })
function(x0: Polynomial[R]) { not (x0 = q and forall(x1: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x1) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x1 - a) * polynomial_eval(x0, x1) }) }(polynomial_quotient(p, a, n))
not forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x0) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x0 - a) * polynomial_eval(polynomial_quotient(p, a, n), x0) } or polynomial_quotient(p, a, n) != q
polynomial_quotient(p, a, n) != q or exists(k0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, k0) != polynomial_eval(p, a) + (k0 - a) * polynomial_eval(polynomial_quotient(p, a, n), k0) }
function(x0: Polynomial[R]) { not forall(x1: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x1) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x1 - a) * polynomial_eval(x0, x1) } or q != x0 }(polynomial_quotient(p, a, n))
not forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x0) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x0 - a) * polynomial_eval(polynomial_quotient(p, a, n), x0) }
exists(k0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, k0) != polynomial_eval(p, a) + (k0 - a) * polynomial_eval(polynomial_quotient(p, a, n), k0) }
exists(k0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, k0) != polynomial_eval(p, a) + (k0 - a) * polynomial_eval(polynomial_quotient(p, a, n), k0) }
let w0: R satisfy { polynomial_eval(p, a) + (w0 - a) * polynomial_eval(polynomial_quotient(p, a, n), w0) != polynomial_eval(p, w0) }
function(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x0 - a) * polynomial_eval(q, x0) = polynomial_eval(p, x0) }(w0)
exists(k0: Polynomial[R]) { k0 = q and forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x0) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x0 - a) * polynomial_eval(k0, x0) } }
let w0: Polynomial[R] satisfy { w0 = q and forall(x1: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x1) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x1 - a) * polynomial_eval(w0, x1) } }
(forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x0) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x0 - a) * polynomial_eval(w0, x0) } = true)
(forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x0 - a) * polynomial_eval(w0, x0) = polynomial_eval(p, x0) })
not exists(k0: Polynomial[R]) { forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x0) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x0 - a) * polynomial_eval(k0, x0) } }
(forall(x0: Polynomial[R]) { not forall(x1: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x1) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x1 - a) * polynomial_eval(x0, x1) } })
function(x0: Polynomial[R]) { not forall(x1: R) { polynomial_eval(p, x1) = polynomial_eval(p, a) + (x1 - a) * polynomial_eval(x0, x1) } }(w0)
